meaning: adj.[鐢焆(閬椾紶)杞綍鍚庣殑
examples: The posttranscriptional processing of RNA is probably a reflection of the procedure of RNA evolution.
Posttranscriptional mRNA processing includes 5 '-capping, splicing and poly-adenylation at the 3' end.
The RNA may undergo special posttranscriptional processing steps required to convert it into a mature, functional form.
